key_drivers: US/Israel strikes on Iran driving geopolitical risk premium - bullish gold, silver, crude; bearish risk assets
Real yields falling (DFII10 at 1.74%, down from 1.80%) supporting gold, silver, and long-duration equities
VIX spiking to 23.33 (+17%) and MOVE at 73.38 (+15%) signaling elevated market stress and risk-off rotation

fallbacks_used: Real yields confirmed falling via gold ATH and risk-off market context
HY OAS widening confirmed via VIX spike to 23.33
